nameInput.prompt: Enter your secret passcode to proceed:

intruder.reload: Reload the page to try again.

protocol.confidential: WARNING: THIS DOCUMENT IS CONFIDENTIAL. DO NOT SHARE THIS INFORMATION.
protocol.intro2:
Strange events reported in a city named Gallarate.
- Sightings of unidentified objects
- Anomalous radio interceptions
protocol.meeting: An extraordinary meeting has been called where your presence is required.
protocol.taskIntro1: You must complete a secret task without anyone noticing.
protocol.taskIntro2: They might discover your identity and cost you 1 point.
protocol.bonus: BONUS TASK: Present any conspiracy theory to earn 5 points.
protocol.alert: Keep your eyes open: many strange things will happen.
protocol.report: Discover the real identity of your companions and file a report using the button below to earn 3 points.
protocol.locationReveal: The final location will be revealed on the day of the event.
protocol.reload: Reload this page to discover it and arrive on time.
protocol.absence: Your absence will be considered highly suspicious.

presentation.subject: Presentation
presentation.body:
Presentation completed. Over.
Please find it attached. Over.

promotion.title: TITLE: INTERPRETER
promotion.task2: - Observe any unusual behavior — even small oddities may be important.
promotion.task3: - Translate everything spoken in the room. Do not miss a word; every detail could contain crucial clues.
promotion.pay: Remuneration: 2 points + performance bonus. High client satisfaction earns 5 extra points.
